name: code_security
description: Manage code security — create a code security configuration for an enterprise, create a code security configuration, attach an enterprise configuration to repositories. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the code security configuration. Must be unique within the enterprise.

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: A description of the code security configuration

parameters.name: advanced_security
parameters.description:
The enablement status of GitHub Advanced Security features. `enabled` will enable both Code Security and Secret Protection features.

> [!WARNING]
> `code_security` and `secret_protection` are deprecated values for this field. Prefer the individual `code_security` and `secret_protection` fields to set the status of these features.

parameters.name: code_security
parameters.description: The enablement status of GitHub Code Security features.

parameters.name: dependency_graph
parameters.description: The enablement status of Dependency Graph

parameters.name: dependency_graph_autosubmit_action
parameters.description: The enablement status of Automatic dependency submission

parameters.name: dependency_graph_autosubmit_action_options
parameters.description: Feature options for Automatic dependency submission

parameters.name: dependabot_alerts
parameters.description: The enablement status of Dependabot alerts

parameters.name: dependabot_security_updates
parameters.description: The enablement status of Dependabot security updates
